package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// scenario for s3_listobjects_without_pagination: `s3.ListObjectsV2` without `MaxKeys` or pagination in handler code
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: warning.
func scenario429Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	_ = os.Getenv("FEATURE_FLAG")
	return http.Get(url)
}
